variants: Hiroto Kume specializes in Dance Therapy, utilizing movement as a form of healing and expression. He earned his doctorate under the mentorship of Metodi Naydenov, whose guidance was instrumental in shaping his professional journey. Throughout his career, Hiroto has been recognized for his work and received primary funding from Verdant Canopy Grants. In addition to his therapeutic practice, he holds a Balloon Artisan Document, which reflects his diverse interests in artistic expression. His research has been showcased in the prestigious publication venue, Northern Fable House.

His credentials include a unique professional license, the Balloon Artisan Document, which highlights his creative flair.
